name: devflow-live2d
description: macOS Live2D desktop overlay for devflow
author: weirwei

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run prepare:bundle && npm run prepare:tauri-web && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run prepare:bundle && npm run prepare:tauri-web && tauri build
scripts.test: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check ui/app.js && node --check src/app/service-runtime.js && bun test
